heading: Research, development and other studies
label: 2571 Research, development and other studies
notes: Amendments1998—–(E), in introductory provisions, inserted “this subchapter in” after “powers in”, substituted “Secretary of State” for “Director” wherever appearing and “ensure” for “insure” in two places, struck out “in accordance with procedures established under ” after “other Government agencies”, and substituted “The authority of the Secretary under this chapter with respect to research, development, and other studies concerning arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament shall be limited to participation in the following:” for “The authority of the Director with respect to research, development, and other studies shall be limited to participation in the following insofar as they relate to arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament:”.Pub. children.heading: Control, reduction and elimination of armed forces and armaments
children.label: a Control, reduction and elimination of armed forces and armaments
children.text: the detection, identification, inspection, monitoring, limitation, reduction, control, and elimination of armed forces and armaments, including thermonuclear, nuclear, missile, conventional, bacteriological, chemical, and radiological weapons:

children.heading: Weapon detection and identification tests
children.label: b Weapon detection and identification tests
children.text: the techniques and systems of detecting, identifying, inspecting, and monitoring of tests of nuclear, thermonuclear, and other weapons;

children.heading: Analysis of national budgets and economic indicators
children.label: c Analysis of national budgets and economic indicators
children.text: the analysis of national budgets, levels of industrial production, and economic indicators to determine the amounts spent by various countries for armaments and of all aspects of anti-satellite activities;1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: Space, earth’s surface and underwater regions
children.label: d Space, earth’s surface and underwater regions
children.text: the control, reduction, and elimination of armed forces and armaments in space, in areas on and beneath the earth’s surface, and in underwater regions;

children.heading: Structure and operation of international control
children.label: e Structure and operation of international control
children.text: the structure and operation of international control and other organizations useful for arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament;

children.heading: Training of control system personnel
children.label: f Training of control system personnel
children.text: the training of scientists, technicians, and other personnel for manning the control systems which may be created by international arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament agreements;

children.heading: Danger of war from accident, miscalculation, or surprise attack
children.label: g Danger of war from accident, miscalculation, or surprise attack
children.text: the reduction and elimination of the danger of war resulting from accident, miscalculation, or possible surprise attack, including (but not limited to) improvements in the methods of communications between nations;

children.heading: Economic and political consequences of disarmament
children.label: h Economic and political consequences of disarmament
children.text: the economic and political consequences of arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament, including the problems of readjustment arising in industry and the reallocation of national resources;

children.heading: Disarmament implications of foreign and national security policies of United States
children.label: i Disarmament implications of foreign and national security policies of United States
children.text: the arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament implications of foreign and national security policies of the United States with a view to a better understanding of the significance of such policies for the achievement of arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament;

children.heading: National security and foreign policy implications of disarmament
children.label: j National security and foreign policy implications of disarmament
children.text: the national security and foreign policy implications of arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament proposals with a view to a better understanding of the effect of such proposals upon national security and foreign policy;

children.heading: Methods for maintenance of peace and security during stages of disarmament
children.label: k Methods for maintenance of peace and security during stages of disarmament
children.text: methods for the maintenance of peace and security during different stages of arms control, nonproliferation, and disarmament;

children.heading: War prevention factors
children.label: l War prevention factors
children.text: the scientific, economic, political, legal, social, psychological, military, and technological factors related to the prevention of war with a view to a better understanding of how the basic structure of a lasting peace may be established; and

children.heading: Other related problems
children.label: m Other related problems
children.text: such related problems as the Secretary of State may determine to be in need of research, development, or study in order to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
